channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 6.0 magnitude earthquake detected off Hawaii coast
item.description: A 6.0 quake struck south of Honaunau-Napoopoo, Hawaii, but no tsunami threat was reported.

item.title: Remains of divers killed in Maldives cave accident sent back to Italy
item.description: Four Italian divers who died in an underwater cave have been repatriated. Another body had been returned earlier.

item.title: Coal mine explosion in China kills 90 people, state media report
item.description: The blast is the deadliest mining accident in China in years.

item.title: Over 40,000 evacuated in California chemical leak as officials warn tank may explode
item.description: Officials in Southern California expanded evacuations in Orange County due to a leaking toxic chemical tank that could explode.
